name: unitmux
description: Send input to tmux sessions from a floating desktop app
author: yugo-ibuki

scripts.start: npm run build:renderer && cargo run -p unitmux --release
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && cargo build --workspace
scripts.build:win: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && cargo build -p unitmux --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:mac: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && cargo build -p unitmux --release && npm run bundle:mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && cargo build -p unitmux --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.web:dev: cd web && npm exec vitepress dev docs
scripts.web:build: cd web && npm exec vitepress build docs
scripts.web:preview: cd web && npm exec vitepress preview docs
